response.justification: Candidate is a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry/junior-level fullstack role. While the technical skills align well (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Kubernetes, LLM/MCP work), the seniority mismatch creates high overqualification risk: likely salary expectations far exceed the role's budget, retention risk is significant, and the candidate may disengage from junior-scope work. PostgreSQL experience is also not explicitly demonstrated (MongoDB is the listed relational/NoSQL DB). On-site presence in Berlin matches geography, but the level mismatch is the dominant factor.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React stack match plus nice-to-haves (AWS, Kubernetes, LLM/MCP)
Software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture interest)
concerns: Severe overqualification — Staff/Senior applying for entry-level IC role
PostgreSQL not explicitly listed; experience is MongoDB/MySQL
High flight risk and likely salary expectation mismatch for a junior position
